source_code:
from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from contextlib import contextmanager
import asyncio

app = FastAPI()

_session_factory = None

@contextmanager
def get_db():
    # BUG: single shared generator object reused across concurrent requests.
    # FastAPI will call next() on the same generator -> "generator already executing".
    db = _session_factory()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()

_shared_db_gen = get_db()  # BUG: created ONCE at module level

def _session_dep():
    # BUG: returns the same generator reference
    return _shared_db_gen

@app.get('/users')
async def list_users(db: Session = Depends(_session_dep)):
    return db.query(User).all()
expected_fix_hint: Do NOT reuse a generator across requests. Define get_db() as a fresh generator per call (Depends(get_db) with yield).
